title: Dungeons +
description: Adds A Brand New Procedurally Generated Dungeon Into Minecraft
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f6b19656663ebecd30d54f41132b725527b9dc7.png)

## **Vanilla Dungeons In Minecraft Suck So I Decided To Update Them**

Dungeons + adds a brand new proceduarally generated structure into minecraft to replace vanilla dungeons. The dungeons are made up of several room, corridors, traps and loot. The structure is considered an early / mid game structure so is not to challenging. The mod also includes:

- A New Music Disc (Made By Davood)
- 2 New Enchants
- 4 New Paintings
- Lower Dungeons
- And Much more
